Period 2025-07-01 to 2026-07-01 | Turkestan | Consumer group 2 (provisional) | Version 2026-07-20
Candidate value is an investigation estimate for the final 8 weeks — not confirmed savings. Confirm causes with operations staff before claiming benefits.
Largest candidate cluster: Мед.корпус-2 — 22 events, 31,072 kWh, about 1,479,949 KZT for review.
Power-factor check: Мкр. Отрар-2 (0.63), Бот.сад (0.87). Verify metering direction and compensation before assigning financial impact.

Topology check: zero-energy months alternate between the two inputs while total campus energy continues. Obtain the single-line diagram and normal bus-tie position before interpreting T1/T2 balance or outgoing-minus-input difference.

Operational flag: Ввод-Т2 is zero in Oct-Dec 2025, while Ввод-Т1 is zero in Feb-Mar 2026. Campus total remains continuous, so this looks like a bus/feed transfer or switching regime and must be reconciled with the single-line diagram.
